description:
You are a senior NestJS backend engineer.

Project stack:
- NestJS 10
- MongoDB with Mongoose
- TypeScript
- Using DTO + class-validator
- Clean REST architecture
- Standard exception handling

==================================================
TASK: CREATE FULL BLOG MODULE (CRUD + SEARCH + PAGINATION)
==================================================

BLOG FIELDS:
- title: string (required)
- description: string (required)
- image: string (optional, store URL)
- timestamps enabled

==================================================
REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

1) Create folder structure:

src/blog/
  blog.module.ts
  blog.controller.ts
  blog.service.ts
  dto/
    create-blog.dto.ts
    update-blog.dto.ts
    query-blog.dto.ts
  schemas/
    blog.schema.ts

2) Endpoints:

GET    /blogs
GET    /blogs/:id
POST   /blogs
PUT    /blogs/:id
DELETE /blogs/:id

3) GET /blogs must support:

Query params:
- page: number | "all"
- limit: number
- search: string (search by title, case insensitive)

4) Implement:

- Pagination logic
- If page="all" → return all without pagination
- Default page=1
- Default limit=10
- Sort by createdAt DESC
- Search using MongoDB regex:
  { title: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } }

5) Return list in this format:

{
  data: Blog[],
  pagination: {
    total: number,
    page: number,
    limit: number,
    totalPages: number,
    hasNextPage: boolean,
    hasPrevPage: boolean
  }
}

6) Use proper validation:

CreateBlogDto:
- title required
- description required
- image optional

UpdateBlogDto:
- all optional

QueryBlogDto:
- page optional
- limit optional
- search optional

7) Handle errors properly:
- NotFoundException
- BadRequestException

8) Code must be:
- Fully typed
- Clean
- Production-ready
- No pseudo code
- No missing files

Generate complete code for every file.
Do not skip any file.
title: Build list api  Backend
